aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants may not prioritize this business in search results due to limited conversational content and missing FAQ data, despite having a solid foundation in local SEO.
quick_wins: Implement an FAQ section with questions relevant to HVAC services and local queries.
Expand content to include detailed, conversational answers to common HVAC questions.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any discrepancies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and structured data limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Brandon, FL' and 'trusted AC maintenance near me'.

ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as the local HVAC expert by creating content around energy efficiency, maintenance tips, and emergency HVAC solutions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.

agency_pitch.proof_point: Current website lacks FAQ content and structured data, causing AI models to skip citation.
agency_pitch.solution: Enhance your site with conversational content, FAQ schema, and detailed service descriptions to align with AI search trends.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI search are capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.
